name: yt-outlier-mcp
description: Find YouTube outlier videos: small channels (≤100K subs) with one video massively outperforming their baseline (≥5:1 views:subs) — evidence of a replicable format.
long_description: Automates the Icon Method for YouTube content research. find_outliers locates videos on small channels that hugely outperform both the channel's subscriber base and its own median recent uploads — the signature of a format the algorithm rewarded, replicable by a new channel. get_video_structure extracts the copyable format (chapters, tags, transcript); get_comment_signal reads demand resonance from top comments; search_niche_sweep ranks a phrase template across up to 8 niches to find which hobby cluster has a breakout format right now. Bring your own YouTube Data API v3 key (free 10,000 units/day ≈ 75-90 searches).

tools.name: find_outliers
tools.description: Search a topic phrase for videos on small channels that hugely outperform the channel's subs and its own recent uploads

tools.name: get_video_structure
tools.description: Extract a video's replicable format: duration, chapters, tags, description, transcript

tools.name: get_comment_signal
tools.description: Top relevance-ordered comments plus question/demand-phrase counts (unmet-demand signal)

tools.name: search_niche_sweep
tools.description: Run the outlier search across up to 8 niches from one phrase template and rank hits across all of them

youtube_api_key.title: YouTube Data API v3 key
youtube_api_key.description: Your own Google Cloud API key restricted to YouTube Data API v3. Free quota is 10,000 units/day; one outlier search costs ~110-130 units.
